longDescription:
Drafts emails, edits spreadsheets, modifies slides, creates calendar events, and reads docs through Google's official APIs — auth once and Claude has hands-on access to your Workspace from chat. Useful for the boring 80% of Workspace tasks: "reply to that email from Sarah and CC the team", "add a row to the budget tracker for this week's Stripe payout", "move Tuesday's 3pm meeting to Wednesday at 10", "summarize the doc I just pasted a link to".

Uses official Google APIs rather than browser automation, so it's stable, fast, and survives Drive UI changes. Pairs with `youcoded-encyclopedia` for "read this doc and update my notes" workflows, and with `youcoded-inbox` so Gmail-sourced captures flow into your normal triage. Workspace and personal Google accounts both supported.
